notes.en: Weapon options below [[weapon:favonius-sword]] do not really affect [[character:xilonen]]'s performance as a Support.

note.en: The buff from this weapon caps out once [[character:xilonen]] reaches 3,200 [[stat:def%|DEF]].

This option is competitive with [[weapon:peak-patrol-song]] if the team can utilize both of its buffs. To proc it consistently, you either need to [[ability:burst|burst]] every rotation, or add a delay between the initial [[ability:skill|skill]] hit and [[ability:na|normal attacking]]. It is not needed to level this weapon for [[character:xilonen]].
Refinements for this weapon are insignificant on [[character:xilonen]].
